transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you signing up for the campus fitness class this semester?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I heard it fills up quickly, so I registered this morning.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the man register this morning?

questions.prompt: Why did the man register this morning?

choices.text: He wanted to avoid the class filling up.

questions.explanation: He registered early because the class fills up quickly.
questions.evidence: I heard it fills up quickly, so I registered this morning.
